summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mis Recetas flow (REC-001, REC-002, REC-003) and MOD-001 UX fix. All core features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. This appears in console logs when opening ingredient modals.
design_issues.impact: Console warning only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: REC-001: My Recipes list view displays correctly with recipe cards
REC-001: Search functionality works (accent and case-insensitive filtering)
REC-001: FAB button present and functional
REC-001: Recipe cards show correct information (title, time, difficulty, servings, status pills)
REC-001: Draft recipes show 'BORRADOR' pill and 'En borrador · paso N de 5' subtitle
REC-001: Completed recipes show 'PRIVADA' pill and metadata (time, difficulty, servings)
REC-001: Long-press delete (via right-click fallback) opens confirmation dialog
REC-001: Delete confirmation dialog shows recipe title and allows cancel
REC-002: Wizard opens successfully from FAB button
REC-002: Step 1 (Title) - input validation and navigation to Step 2 works
REC-002: Step 2 (Difficulty + Time) - segmented control and time input work, advances to Step 3
REC-002: Step 3 (Servings) - stepper with +/- buttons works, advances to Step 4
REC-002: Step 4 (Ingredients) - 'Añadir ingrediente' modal opens
REC-002: Step 4 - Ingredient search works (client-side filtering)
REC-002: Step 4 - Ingredient selection and quantity/unit form works
REC-002: Step 4 - Multiple ingredients can be added
REC-002: Step 4 - Ingredient list displays with quantity, unit, and key toggle
REC-002: Step 4 - Advances to Step 5 when at least one ingredient added
REC-002: Step 5 (Steps) - Textarea for recipe steps works
REC-002: Step 5 - 'Añadir paso' button adds new step textarea
REC-002: Step 5 - Multiple steps can be added
REC-002: Step 5 - 'Guardar receta' button enabled when at least one step has text
REC-002: Final save creates recipe and navigates back to /my-recipes
REC-002: New recipe appears at top of list after saving
REC-002: Close confirmation dialog appears when clicking X button
REC-002: Close confirmation shows correct message based on draft state
REC-002: 'Continuar editando' button cancels close and stays in wizard
REC-002: Draft persistence - clicking draft recipe opens wizard in resume mode
REC-002: Draft resume - wizard opens at correct step (draft_step)
REC-002: Draft resume - all previously entered data is pre-populated
REC-002: Wizard header shows 'Paso N de 5' label correctly
REC-002: Wizard progress bar updates correctly
REC-002: Wizard hides bottom tab bar (full-screen mode)
REC-003: Clicking completed recipe navigates to /my-recipes/:id
REC-003: Recipe detail page shows 'PRÓXIMAMENTE' placeholder
REC-003: Recipe detail page shows 'Detalle de receta' title
REC-003: Recipe detail page shows bottom tab bar (not full-screen)
MOD-001 UX Fix: 'Marcar como básico' toggle in Despensa modal works
MOD-001 UX Fix: When toggle ON, Cantidad input is disabled and visually muted (bg-surface-secondary, text-ink-secondary)
MOD-001 UX Fix: When toggle ON, Unidad select is disabled and visually muted
MOD-001 UX Fix: When toggle OFF, both inputs return to normal active state
All UI text in Spanish
Design system adhered (terracotta primary color, Playfair Display for titles, Inter for body)
No critical console errors (only minor hydration warning)
